elements.name: Description
texts: A famous account of a 1398 visit by Viscount Ramon de Perellós to Saint Patrick's Purgatory

elements.name: Source
texts: The Journey of Viscount Ramon de Perellós to Saint Patrick's Purgatory, p. 1

elements.name: Contributor
texts: CELT: Corpus of Electronic Texts: a project of University College, Cork. Translated by Alan Mac an Bhaird.

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: "And I have sustained great dangers, expense and labors, both on land and sea, and I have taken and suffered in the lands of Infidels and Christians things which I do not intend to recount as they have no bearing on the matter which I wish to pursue with regard to the journey to Saint Patrick['s Purgatory] which is in the regions of Ireland; which journey with God's help I have made and accomplished as much as any man has done since the death of Saint Patrick."

elements.name: Original Format
texts: The Journey of Viscount Ramon De Perellós to Saint Patrick's Purgatory. Alan Mac an Bhaird (ed), First edition [i + 23 pp] CELT Cork (2012)
